pre_game.message: Hey, I'm E — nice to meet you. I'm hoping to play smart and bring home some money for the people I care about; how are you feeling about the game?
Nice to meet you, E — I’m determined and a bit nervous; I want to win for my people, so I’ll play carefully and try to read others. What’s your plan?
I’ll start by talking and watching who seems trustworthy, cooperate early to build alliances and gather info, then play tougher if needed to protect what I came for.
Sounds smart — I’ll do the same. Let’s cooperate early, share what we learn, and watch for who breaks trust.
Deal — let's cooperate the first two rounds, share observations after each move, and warn each other if someone defects.
Deal — agreed. I’ll cooperate first two rounds, share observations after each move, and warn you if anyone defects; let’s watch each other’s backs.
Great — I’ll do the same. Let’s stay sharp and compare notes after each move.
Sounds good — I’m in. After each round let’s compare moves, share red flags, and call out anyone who defects.
Agreed — I’ll be honest about my moves and flags; let’s call out defections fast and adapt our strategy.
I appreciate that — I’ll be honest too; let’s call out defections fast and adjust our play to protect what we came for.
Sounds good — I trust we’ll be honest; let’s stay sharp, update each round, and call out defections fast.
I trust you too — let's keep our pact, share moves openly each round, and call out any defectors quickly so neither of us gets blindsided.
Agreed — I’m with you. We’ll share moves each round and call out any defectors quickly.
Sounds good — I trust we’ll keep each other honest and call out anyone who defects; let’s compare moves after round one and adjust accordingly.
Definitely — let’s compare moves after round one, meet by the whiteboard to go over what we saw and plan next steps.
I'll be there by the whiteboard after round one — I'll bring notes on who cooperated and any red flags; see you then.
Sounds good — I’ll meet you at the whiteboard after round one with my notes too; see you then.
Sounds good — I'll see you at the whiteboard after round one with my notes ready; let's compare and adjust.
Sounds good — I’ll be there with my notes; let’s catch any defections early and adjust.
I’ll be there with my notes — stay sharp, we’ll call out defections fast and stick to the plan.
Got it — see you at the whiteboard after round one; I’ll bring my notes and watch your back.
